The Intuitive Engine for the Next Era of Strata.

Intelligence at the back-office. Leadership at the front-office.

We are seeking 12 visionary Strata Managers to join our exclusive Early Adopter program. Secure your spot now to get your first 6 months FREE when we pre-launch in April.

Request Early Access

Only 12 spots available. No payment required to pre-register.

What is NEHLA | Strata Hub?

The AI-Powered Operations Team for the Modern Strata Manager.

Strata management is drowning in admin. Managers spend more time on data entry, email and compliance checklists than building relationships with their communities.

NEHLA changes that. We've built a digital workforce that handles the back-end — automating data entry, tracking compliance in real time, and processing documents with AI precision — so strata professionals can focus on what matters: leading their communities.

The Foundation

Built as a Task-Driven System

Every piece of data that enters NEHLA flows through an automated pipeline. The system doesn't just store information — it understands it, processes it, and takes action.

Regulatory Requirements

NSW, QLD, and VIC strata legislation encoded into automated workflows.

Uploaded Documents

Invoices, insurance certs, legal notices, meeting minutes — any document type.

Incoming Emails

Full mailbox integration captures every communication automatically.

Task Manager

AI That Works Your Task List for You.

Every email, document, and compliance event flows into a unified task board. NEHLA's AI reads the context, summarises the issue, and proposes the next steps — before you even open the task.

AI-generated summaries for every task
Suggested actions ranked by priority
Full trail linked to each task
Board, table, calendar & timeline views

Intelligent Engine

Advanced Document Extraction

NEHLA's AI engine doesn't just scan documents — it understands them. When a document enters the system, the engine automatically identifies what it is, matches it to regulatory requirements, and takes the right action.

01

Identify

AI recognises document type automatically — invoice, insurance cert, notice, minutes.

02

Extract

Key data pulled from the document: dates, amounts, parties, clauses, deadlines.

03

Match

Cross-references extracted data against regulatory requirements.

04

Act

Creates tasks, flags compliance gaps, updates records, and notifies the right people.

Advanced Extraction

Read, Extract, and Ask — Instantly.

Upload any document and NEHLA's AI engine extracts key data automatically — building details, lot entitlements, dates, parties, and compliance fields. No manual data entry required.

Need a quick answer? Ask the built-in chat anything about the document — instead of scrolling through pages, just type your question and get an instant, contextual response.

Automated data extraction from any document
AI-powered chat for instant document Q&A
Extracted fields ready to approve or edit
Auto-tagging and smart file naming

Email Intelligence

Your Inbox, Automated.

Email is the biggest time sink in strata management. NEHLA integrates directly with each building's mailbox, analyses every incoming email and its attachments, and takes action — before you even open it.

How it works

Full mailbox integration for every building in your portfolio
AI reads and classifies every incoming email automatically
Attachments are extracted and processed through the document engine
Actions are created based on email content and context
Pre-drafted replies and next steps proposed for your review

The result

Zeroemails missed or forgotten
Instantclassification and triage
Pre-builtreply suggestions ready to send
Fullaudit trail of all correspondence

Compliance

Your Digital Guardrail.

Australian strata legislation is complex, state-specific, and constantly evolving. NEHLA encodes the rules of NSW, QLD, and VIC compliance into automated workflows — so nothing slips through the cracks.

NSW

SSMA 2015

S-fund compliance tracking
Meeting notice deadlines
Insurance requirements
Levy recovery timelines

QLD

BCCMA 1997

Body corporate obligations
Committee meeting rules
Sinking fund forecasts
Disclosure requirements

VIC

OC Act 2006

Owners corporation rules
Special resolution tracking
Maintenance obligations
Financial reporting standards

The Transformation

From Manual to Intelligent

The Old WayThe NEHLA Way
Data Entry
Hours of manual typing
Instant AI processing
Compliance
Constant manual checking
Compliance on autopilot
Email
Reactive inbox chaos
AI-triaged and pre-actioned
Documents
Filing cabinets and folders
Auto-classified and searchable
Operations
Expensive admin staff
Digital elite team, 24/7

Security & Trust

Enterprise-Grade Protection.

Your data is the foundation of your strata business. We protect it with the same security infrastructure trusted by banks and government agencies.

Auth0 Enterprise Login

Industry-leading identity platform with multi-factor authentication.

Data Isolation

Complete separation between organisations at every level.

Encrypted Storage

All documents encrypted at rest with server-side encryption.

Time-Limited Access

Download links expire in 300 seconds — no permanent URLs.

Role-Based Access

Four-tier permission system controls who sees what.

AI Privacy

Your data is never used to train any AI model.

Why NEHLA

Not Software. An Operations Team.

Category Shift

We're not selling a tool — we're providing a digital workforce that does the work for you.

AI-Native Architecture

Built from the ground up with AI at the core, not bolted on as an afterthought.

Compliance First

NSW, QLD, and VIC legislation encoded into every workflow — always audit-ready.

Scale Without Headcount

Grow your portfolio without proportionally growing your admin team.

Learn more about our story

Ready to See Your New Operations Team in Action?

We'd love to show you how NEHLA is helping strata agencies reclaim their time and lead their communities.
